title: No Piglin Brutes
description: original no piglin brutes after 1.16.1 version on planetminecraft.com
body:
While Piglin Brutes may annoy you in versions higher than 1.16.1, thanks to this data pack, Piglin Brutes will despawn as soon as they spawn. (you wont see them)
### Take a loot at my other projects ### [Fair Fishing Loot](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fair-fishing-loot) ### [Need More Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/need-more-structures) ### [Shield of Undying](https://modrinth.com/datapack/shield-of-undying)
